title: dalbergia semiapplanata
intro: Dalbergia semiapplanata, also known as Panga Pina or Panga Tree, is a tropical plant species native to the forests of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin infections, and fever. The health benefits of Dalbergia semiaplanata include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in the form of a paste or ointment to be applied topically.
